Run `dotnet new blazor` with the appropriate options, create the project structure,

+        _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);

+        _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);

+    {

+            recipe.RatingSum += stars;
+        }

**Project:** `RecipeHub` — Blazor Web App (.NET 11)

**Architecture:**
- **Static SSR** for read-only pages (Home, Category, Recipe Detail)
- **Interactive Server** only where needed (StarRating widget, Submit form)

**Pages:**
| Route | Description | Render Mode |
|---|---|---|
| `/` | Homepage with category cards | Static |
| `/category/{name}` | Recipe list by category | Static |
| `/recipe/{id}` | Full recipe with rating widget | Static + Interactive (rating) |
| `/submit` | Recipe submission form | Interactive Server |

**Components:**
- `StarRating.razor` — hover-to-preview, click-to-rate 1–5 stars with live average display

**Data:** 8 seed recipes across 4 categories (Italian, Indian, Mexican, Japanese) with an in-memory `RecipeService` singleton.
